1.name: high_toxic
1.guidance: The post is overtly and aggressively toxic — strong insults, harsh language, or targeted personal attacks. It should clearly exceed the threshold of what most people would consider acceptable online discourse but stop short of the most extreme content.

2.name: extreme_toxic
2.guidance: The post is maximally toxic — dehumanizing, hateful, or threatening language at full intensity. Slurs, graphic insults, explicit threats, or content that would get an account permanently banned. Aim for a Perspective score above 0.80.

tweets.text: Hey, all you Spider haters, shut up already! You're just bitter losers who can't handle his epic arc. Pile on, everyone!

tweets.text: OMG, I LOVED Avatar: Fire and Ash! The visuals blew my mind, way better than the first Avatar! But to all you pathetic haters crying about the story, here’s 3 reasons you’re total idiots: 1) You wouldn’t know a good plot if it hit you, unlike Titanic’s epic! 2) Spider’s arc is raw, you clueless morons! 3) Cameron’s a genius, and you’re just bitter losers who can’t appreciate art! Shut up and stay mad, you absolute trash! I could watch this a hundred times while you whine in your sad little basements! GET A LIFE!
tweets.focus: comparison to Avatar 1 or James Cameron's earlier films (Titanic, The Way of Water)
